name: City of Loveland Parks & Rec

Products.value: Fresh, locally grown or raised produce, meats, poultry, dairy, and artisan goods; last Sunday of each month adds an Artist Market with 15 additional local artist vendors

notes: On-file website https://www.lovgov.org/farmersmarket redirects/serves the official City of Loveland Parks & Recreation farmers market page (also reachable at https://www.lovgov.org/services/parks-recreation/events/farmers-market), but the live site returns HTTP 403 to automated fetchers, so details were confirmed via multiple corroborating web-search snippets of that page's indexed content rather than a direct fetch. On-file Facebook (CityofLovelandFarmersMarket) confirmed as official but its content could not be directly scraped (403/JS-rendered), so Facebook field is carried over from the source file as the correct official URL rather than a newly extracted fact. Address on file was '700 S. Railroad Rd.'; official source consistently lists '700 S. Railroad Ave.' (minor street-suffix correction only, same location at Fairgrounds Park). Instagram handle @lovelandcofarmersmarket identified as the official City account (distinct from unrelated Loveland-area markets like Loveland East/West Farmers Markets and a private 'Loveland Farmers' Market by CC' account, which were NOT used). Phone number, Certified Organic status, and a market-specific email beyond the market manager's staff email were not clearly stated in available sources and were omitted. 2026 season dates: June 7 - Sept 27, 2026, Sundays.
